name: Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd.
business: Scinai Immunotherapeutics Ltd. (formerly BiondVax) is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing, manufacturing, and commercializing innovative immunotherapeutic products, primarily based on nanosized antibody (NanoAb) technology, for the treatment of infectious and autoimmune diseases. The company has built a GMP biologics manufacturing facility and is developing a pipeline targeting COVID-19, psoriasis, asthma, and wet macular degeneration. It seeks to commercialize through partnerships with health organizations, governments, and pharmaceutical companies.

exposures.sentence: BiondVax is a biopharmaceutical company focused on developing, manufacturing and commercializing innovative immunotherapeutic products primarily for the treatment of infectious and autoimmune diseases.

catalysts.event: First-in-human Phase 1/2a clinical trial for COVID-19 NanoAb
catalysts.sentence: The COVID-19 NanoAb is our first in a new pipeline of innovative NanoAb drugs addressing diseases with large underserved medical needs and attractive commercial opportunities for which first-in-human Phase 1/2a clinical trials is planned for 2023.
